---
title: "Carpinus"
toc: true
---

{{< include ../_tree-search.qmd >}}

# Species in the genus *Carpinus* (Hornbeams)

[Back to Tree Database](../index.html)

## Species summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Hornbeam](/trees/species/hornbeam.html) | 3 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |

- [*Carpinus betulus* Hornbeam](/trees/species/hornbeam.html) — 3 trees

## Planted locations

| Location | Trees |
|---|---:|
| SK: Nature Discovery Garden | 3 |
